LAW AND MOTION 301,DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS. DEFENDANT LYFT INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS, WHICH IS UNOPPOSED, IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFFS' CLAIMS AGAINST LYFT ARE ORDERED TO BINDING ARBITRATION PURSUANT TO THE TERMS OF SERVICE, AND PROCEEDINGS ON PLAINTIFFS' CLAIMS AGAINST LYFT ARE STAYED PENDING THE OUTCOME OF THAT ARBITRATION. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (301)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2025 Set For Trial On Aug-10-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2024 Continued To Oct-22-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Dec-09-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings

Defendant Lyft Inc.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings, which is unopposed, is GRANTED. Plaintiffs' claims against Lyft are ordered to binding arbitration pursuant to the Terms of Service, and proceedings on Plaintiffs' claims against Lyft are stayed pending the outcome of that arbitration.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2024 Continued To Jan-22-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Sep-17-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and rules as follows;

DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings.

Lyft, Inc.'s unopposed motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings is off claender pursuant to Defendant Lyft's Notice taking motion off calender filed on September 6, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
